chunks.text: North campus power outage Jan 4, 2025 | IRIS Skip to main content Skip to primary navigation Skip to primary sidebar North campus power outage Jan 4, 2025 We have a power outage on part of campus, affecting at least Cory and Soda Halls, starting at j

ecting at least Cory and Soda Halls, starting at just after 8am this morning. All EECS systems and networks may be unavailable until power is restored. UPDATE [2025-01-04 | larsrohr ] While the cause of the power outage remains unclear, campus Facili

of the power outage remains unclear, campus Facilities staff are restoring power to buildings one by one. We are seeing power in Soda and Cory, and will be working on restoring EECS infrastructure services. UPDATE [2025-01-04 | larsrohr ] IRIS servic

vices. UPDATE [2025-01-04 | larsrohr ] IRIS services should all be up as of 5pm. We are continuing to monitor our services for any issues. If you are having any issues with your workstation or server, we recommend starting with a reboot. Resolved as

we recommend starting with a reboot. Resolved as of 2025-01-04 17:00 Primary Sidebar IRIS Service Status We have 0 Active Incidents, and 1 Scheduled Maintenance noted. IST Service Status Outages to campus services are listed at berkeley.statusdashbo
